Recovery complete â€” pushed `9c12ec0a..1aa8f34a` to `origin/main` (the trailing changelog commit `697d40d7` went with it). This is intentionally my **last tool call**: running `git status` again would append a fresh PreToolUse audit line and re-create exactly the tracked-unstaged change that blocks the next session's rebase. So I'm stopping here and reporting from known state.

## Recovery summary

**What was found** â€” a dirty tree from the recurring benign-churn pattern (audit-hook appends + wrapper session-output writes landing outside any single session's commit window), the same class the 2026-06-13 PM recovery documented. 6 dirty paths, all category-(a)/(c), **nothing unattributable** (no operator ask needed):

| Path | Classification | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `handoff/audit/instructions_loaded_audit.jsonl` (+11) | append-only audit stream | committed |
| `handoff/audit/pre_tool_use_audit.jsonl` (+118) | append-only audit stream | committed |
| `handoff/prompt_leak_redteam_audit.jsonl` (+11) | append-only audit stream | committed |
| `handoff/away_ops/session_pm_20260613T200009Z.json` (+1) | prior recovery's trailing result line | committed |
| `handoff/away_ops/session_am_20260614T053008Z.json` (3871 B) | completed AM session output | committed |
| `handoff/away_ops/session_pm_20260614T200007Z.json` (0 B) | **this** session's live output | left untracked (intentional) |

Verified the tracked diffs were pure append-only (0 deletion lines); confirmed no code, `.env`, trading-behavior, or masterplan file was touched.

**What was done** â€” two truthful `chore(away-ops)` recovery commits pushed to `origin/main`: `9c12ec0a` (artifact/audit sweep + `session_notes.md` recovery section) and `1aa8f34a` (fold the self-referential audit line so the next `git pull --rebase` is no longer blocked â€” directly attacking the OFFLINE-MODE loop visible in `session.log`). Plus the auto-changelog hook's `697d40d7`, pushed alongside.

**What remains** â€” nothing for recovery. Best achievable honest end-state: no tracked-unstaged changes (rebase-block broken), one intentional 0-byte untracked active-session file (doesn't block rebase), and at most one trailing auto-changelog commit for `1aa8f34a` that the next session carries forward (a committed object â€” also doesn't block rebase).

**Rails honored** â€” commit-only, no `checkout`/`restore`/`stash` (rail 3); main-only, no force-push (rail 3); no `.env`/code/trading-behavior/masterplan file touched (rails 2/6); $0 metered, LLM-free git/ls only (rail 4); no operator token consumed or owed (rail 10). Per the recovery mandate, **no masterplan step was started or advanced** â€” 62.2 stays CONDITIONAL pending the operator `TEST TOKEN: PING` drill. The next AM session resumes the calendar on a clean tree. Exiting.
